name: Friction Sensitivity Study
description: A robotics engineer must characterize how surface friction affects object sliding behavior in a CoppeliaSim physics simulation. Using the ZMQ Remote API (port 23000), characterize the relationship between friction coefficients and slide distance by testing at least 8 distinct friction values in the range [0.05, 1.0]. For each trial, apply an initial linear velocity of 1.0 m/s to a test block on a floor plane and measure the resulting slide distance and settling time. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/friction_sweep.csv (columns: trial_id, friction_coeff, slide_distance_m, settling_time_s) and a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/friction_report.json (fields: total_trials, friction_min, friction_max, max_slide_distance_m, min_slide_distance_m, monotonic_decreasing).
